arts.ttl: 'It was like home for me' - Eddie Nketiah opens up on Arsenal transfer exit - football.london
arts.sum: Nketiah - who moved to Arsenal from Chelsea’s academy - has unpacked why he chose Palace as his next employers, having spent more than a decade at the Gunners. Eddie Nketiah says his exit from Arsenal has allowed him to pursue his next steps in football, having been starved for game time towards the end of last season.

arts.ttl: 'I know what's needed from me': Alex Scott on breaking into Cherries starting 11
arts.sum: Alex Scott knows what is needed from him to break into the AFC Bournemouth starting 11 – but knows he must take the chance when it comes.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could be without 11 players against Bournemouth as training images released

arts.sum: The 37-year-old, who won the Champions League and two Premier League titles during his time at Chelsea, often saved his best performances for the big occasions. Mikel ended his career after playing for Kuwait SC in the Kuwait Premier League in 2021.

arts.ttl: Stan Kroenke urged to green light £100m striker transfer to complete dream Arsenal squad
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has performed well in the striker role so far this season, scoring six goals in 10 appearances, but former Gunners winger Jermaine Pennant believes Isak would be a significant upgrade. Arsenal were one of the sides interested in Isak, football.london understands, but the Magpies did not want to lose their star forward on the cheap and were demanding in excess of £100million.
